profile.name: Abhishek S
profile.title: Full Stack & AI Engineer
taglineOptions: Technical Expertise – Skilled in MERN stack, Python, Java, Data Structures & Algorithms, AWS cloud services (EC2, IAM, S3), and AI-based systems.

Practical Experience – Hands-on internships in cloud technology and cybersecurity analysis, plus project development of Blood Link, a MERN-based life-saving web application integrating donor-recipient matching and emergency alerts.

Strengths & Achievements – Strong problem-solving and communication skills, HackerRank certifications in C, Python, and problem-solving, with additional training in Unix/Linux fundamentals through Infosys Springboard.
profile.summary: I build high-impact digital products at the intersection of AI, full stack development, and product design. I focus on performant systems, cloud-ready deployments, and usability-driven engineering that supports real business outcomes.

projects.title: Blood Link
projects.description: Online platform connecting blood donors and recipients for emergency needs with ml model to predict blood group using fingerprint data.
projects.longDescription: Led a 2-member team to design and develop a MERN-based web application for emergency blood donation.Integrated donor registration, emergency alerts, and fingerprint-based blood group detection.Coordinated with medical student delivery partners for doorstep blood collection.
projects.image: Blood Link web app interface showing donor registration and emergency alert features
highlights: Full-stack blood donation system with an Express backend and a mixed static + React frontend.
User auth and verification via email OTP and SMS OTP.
Blood type prediction using a saved machine learning model.
Email delivery through Gmail OAuth2 and SMS delivery via Fast2SMS.

projects.title: ROOT CAUSE ANALYSIS & PREVENTION SYSTEM FOR AIR POLLUTION
projects.description: The AI-Powered Urban Pollution Root Cause Intelligence Platform is a production-grade, smart-city environmental analytics platform. It combines real-time data ingestion (OpenAQ and weather APIs), predictive machine learning (XGBoost), and explainable AI (Gemini LLM & ChromaDB RAG) to detect, analyze, and explain the root causes of urban air pollution. The platform presents these insights through an interactive React dashboard with mapping, automated policy reporting, and a conversational assistant.
projects.longDescription: The AI-Powered Urban Pollution Root Cause Intelligence Platform is a full-stack, dockerized smart-city system that integrates real-time spatial data, APIs, machine learning, and LLMs to make air quality factors explainable and actionable. It combines a React-based interactive frontend with a FastAPI backend, XGBoost ML inference, vector databases, and asynchronous pipelines to diagnose pollution sources like traffic, industry, construction, or biomass. By merging live AQI data with historical records, analytics, and AI-driven policy recommendations, it empowers city administrators and residents to understand and mitigate urban air pollution effectively.
projects.image: Air pollution analytics dashboard with real-time data visualization
highlights: Explainable AI (XAI) → Root cause + natural language recommendations
Real-Time Data Pipeline → Continuous ingestion + synthesis
Glassmorphism Dashboard → Live hotspots, predictive breakdown, time-series trends

projects.title: ContentOps AI Engine
projects.description: AI-powered enterprise content automation platform for creation, compliance review, localization, and multi-channel publishing.
projects.longDescription: Built a multi-agent AI workflow that transforms enterprise knowledge into audience-specific content assets while automating compliance checks, brand governance, localization, formatting, and publishing across multiple channels with human-in-the-loop approvals.
projects.image: Enterprise AI agents automating content creation, compliance, localization, and publishing workflow
highlights: Automated end-to-end enterprise content lifecycle using multi-agent AI orchestration
Implemented compliance and brand governance validation with human review checkpoints
Enabled multilingual localization and multi-channel content publishing
Integrated AI safety guardrails including prompt injection and content validation
Reduced manual content processing time through intelligent workflow automation

projects.title: OrderFlow AI
projects.description: AI-powered conversational order tracking and manufacturing operations platform with RAG-based product and SOP intelligence.
projects.longDescription: Built a hybrid AI + rule-engine manufacturing operations system that automates order creation, tracking, quality logging, SOP retrieval, and product catalog intelligence using token-efficient LLM workflows, FAISS vector search, RBAC security, and stateless FastAPI architecture.
projects.image: Industrial manufacturing dashboard with AI-powered order tracking, vector search, and quality inspection workflow
highlights: Implemented hybrid AI + deterministic rule-engine architecture for zero-token operational workflows
Built RAG-powered product catalog and SOP retrieval using FAISS vector embeddings
Developed secure RBAC system with JWT authentication for User, Operator, and Quality roles
Designed stateless conversational API with OpenAI function-calling and token usage analytics
Created end-to-end manufacturing order lifecycle with quality inspection and compliance tracking
Achieved token-efficient AI processing using selective LLM invocation and retrieval optimization

The skills gained from this course are invaluable for any software development role, as Python is widely used in various domains including web development, data science, and automation.
